description: Controls how the Academic Load dashboard converts weekly teaching, student counts, activities, meetings, and school events into one comparable load score. Total load score = teaching weight x weekly teaching hours + student weight x (students taught / student ratio divisor) + activity weight x weekly activity hours + meeting weight x weekly average meeting hours + school event weight x weekly average event hours. Thresholds then classify the score as Low, Normal, High, or Critical.

fields.description: The dashboard uses the active policy for the selected school. Only one active policy per school is allowed.
fields.label: Is Active

fields.description: Marks the zero-config policy created automatically for a school. Turn this off only when this record is no longer your baseline default.
fields.label: Is System Default

fields.description: Turns on automatically after any configurable value in this policy has been changed from its earlier saved state.
fields.label: Was Customized

fields.description: Multiplier applied to weekly teaching hours. Example: 18 teaching hours with weight 1.0 adds 18.0 load units.
fields.label: Teaching Weight

fields.description: Multiplier applied to the student adjustment after dividing students taught by the Student Ratio Divisor. Example: 30 students / 15 divisor x 1.0 weight = 2.0 load units.
fields.label: Student Weight

fields.description: Converts student count into load units before Student Weight is applied. Example: divisor 15 means every 15 students count as 1.0 base unit.
fields.label: Student Ratio Divisor

fields.description: Multiplier applied to weekly activity hours from activity-based Student Groups.
fields.label: Activity Weight

fields.description: Multiplier applied to weekly average meeting hours. The meeting hours come from the blend mode and the past/future day windows below.
fields.label: Meeting Weight

fields.description: Multiplier applied to weekly average school event hours scheduled inside the future horizon.
fields.label: School Event Weight

fields.description: Number of past days used to measure historical meeting time. In blended mode this also shapes the past side of the meeting average.
fields.label: Meeting Window Days

fields.description: Number of upcoming days used to measure scheduled meetings and school events. In blended mode this shapes the future side of the meeting average.
fields.label: Future Horizon Days

fields.description: Past Average Only uses only past meeting hours inside the Meeting Window. Future Scheduled Only uses only upcoming meetings inside the Future Horizon. Blended Past + Future averages the past weekly value and the future weekly value.
fields.label: Meeting Blend Mode
fields.options:
Past Average Only
Future Scheduled Only
Blended Past + Future

fields.description: Total load scores below this value are classified as Low.
fields.label: Underutilized Threshold

fields.description: Total load scores from the Underutilized Threshold up to below this value are classified as Normal. This must stay higher than the Underutilized Threshold.
fields.label: High Load Threshold

fields.description: Total load scores from the High Load Threshold up to below this value are classified as High. Scores at or above this value are classified as Critical.
fields.label: Overload Threshold

fields.description: When checked, meetings with status Cancelled are ignored when calculating meeting hours.
fields.label: Exclude Cancelled Meetings

fields.description: Optional note to explain why this school changed the default scoring or threshold values.
fields.label: Notes

name: Academic Load Policy
